name: law firms processing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient citation formatting causes delays in brief submissions. We automate citation formatting and case law lookups instead of manual citation formatting and case law searches.
problem_solved: Time-consuming citation formatting and case law lookups for brief writing.
